L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 347] ubZ fnYyh] 'kqØokj] iQjojh 10] 2017@ek?k 21] 1938 No. 347] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 10, 2017/MAGHA 21, 1938 िवदेश मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 7 फरवरी, 2017 का.आ. 383(अ).— जबᳰक, U;w डवलपमे᭠ट बᱹक (इसके पश्चात् बᱹक कहा जाएगा) कᳱ LFkkपना के संबंध मᱶ बीआरआईसीएस (िᮩ Dl) देशᲂ के बीच मᱶ एक अंतर-सरकारी करार मᱶ 15 जुलाई, 2014 को फोटाᭅलेजा मᱶ हLrkᭃᳯरत ᳰकया गया; और जबᳰक, भारत सरकार ᳇ारा उDत अंतर-सरकारी करार को 25 माचᭅ,2015 को अनुसमᳶथत ᳰकया गया; और जबᳰक, उDत अंतर-सरकारी करार के अनुबंध के vè;k; VI के अनुPNsद 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35 और 36 के तहत इस बᱹक, उसके ᮧितिनिधयᲂ एवं अिधकाᳯरयᲂ को िवशेषािधकार एवं उनमुिᲦका ᮧावधान है; और जबᳰक, कᱶᮤीय सरकार िवचार करती है ᳰक संयु Dत रा"Vª संघ (िवशेषािधकार एवं उनमुिᲦ) अिधिनयम, 1947 (1947 का 46) के तहत ᮧदRr आव';d िवशेषािधकार एवं उनमुिᲦ इस बᱹक, इसके ᮧितिनिधयᲂ एवं अिधकाᳯरयᲂ को ᮧदान करना समीचीन होगा; अब, अत: संयुDत रा"Vª (िवशेषािधकार एवं उनमुिᲦ) अिधिनयम, 1947 (1947 का 46) कᳱ धारा 3 ᳇ारा ᮧदRr शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, कᱶᮤीय सरकार एत᳏ारा घोषणा करत ी है ᳰक उDत अनुसूची के अनुच्छेद I कᳱ धारा 1, अनुPNsद II कᳱ धारा 2,3,4,5,6 तथा धारा 7, अनुPNsद III कᳱ धारा 9, अनुPNsद V कᳱ धारा 18 के खंड़ (क),(ख),(ग),(घ) एवं (ड़) तथा धारा 20, अनुPNsद VI कᳱ धारा 22 के खंड़ (क),(ख), (ग),(ड़) और (च) तथा धारा 23 के ᮧावधान यथाव';d पᳯरवᭅतन सिहत U;w डवलपमे᭠ट बᱹक तथा उसके ᮧितिनिधयᲂ एवं अिधकाᳯरयᲂ पर लागू होगा । [फा. सं डी-II/451/16(1)/2017] संजय वमाᭅ, संयुDत सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 2 MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th February, 2017 S.O. 383(E).— Whereas, an inter-governmental agreement between the BRICS countries relating to establishment of the New Development Bank (hereinafter referred to as the Bank) was signed at Fortaleza on 15th July, 2014; And whereas, the said inter-governmental agreement was ratified by the Government of India on 25th March, 2015; And whereas, Article 28, 29, 30, 31, 32, 33, 34, 35 and Article 36 of Chapter VI of the Annex to the said inter-governmental agreement provide for privileges and immunities of the Bank, its representatives and officials; And whereas, the Central Government considers it expedient to extend the necessary privileges and immunities provided under the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 (46 of 1947) to the Bank, its represetatives and officials; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 (46 of 1947), the Central Government hereby declares that the provisions of section 1 of Article I, sections 2,3,4,5,6 and section 7 of Article II, section 9 of Article III, clauses (a), (b), (c), (d) and (e) of section 18 and section 20 of Article V and clauses (a), (b), (c), (e) and (f) of section 22 and section 23 of Article VI of the Schedule to the said Act shall apply, mutatis mutandis, to the New Development Bank, its representatives and officials. [F. No. D-II/451/16(1)/2017] SANJAY VERMA, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
